description:
Update Gallery Card Counter Z-Index Layer Positioning

Fix the visual stacking order of the gallery card counter so it appears above the image instead of being hidden underneath.

Requirements:
- Increase the z-index value of `.gallery-card .gallery-card-count` to ensure it layers above the gallery image
- Verify that the parent `.gallery-card` element has appropriate positioning context (position: relative) for z-index to work
- Test that the counter remains visible across different gallery card states (hover, active, etc.)
- Ensure the z-index value doesn't conflict with other UI elements (modals, dropdowns, tooltips)
- Confirm visual appearance is correct across different browsers
title: Fix gallery card counter z-index layering
